summary: RPG game with character progression, stat investment, abilities, and class-based characters. Multiple bug fixes in progress.
known_issues: Stat points spent during level-up not reflected in Character tab stats
Ability selection disabled (grayed out) at level 1 even when ability points are available

existing_features.title: Fix the level-up stat point allocation so that points spent on STR (and other stats) in the LevelUpModal are correctly persisted and reflected in the Character tab's displayed stats. After spending a stat point, the Character Sheet must show the updated stat value immediately.

Fix the ability selection UI so that when a character has at least one unspent ability point (including at level 1), the available class abilities in the AbilitySelectModal are enabled and interactive, not grayed out/disabled.
Display each character's class (e.g. Warrior, Rogue, Mage) on the CharacterSelectScreen character list entries, shown as a visible label or badge beneath or alongside the character's name.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix stat points not applying to character strength in Character tab
Fix abilities grayed out at level 1 when ability point is available
Display character class on Character Select screen
